name: Core Tools
description: Built-in agent tools: web search, URL fetching, calculator, and current time. Always active.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web for current information. Returns titles, URLs, and snippets.

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch and read the text content of a web page.

tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Evaluate a mathematical expression and return the result.

tools.name: get_time
tools.description: Get the current date and time.
